name: Multi-Format Content Repurposer
description: Take one piece of content and use Claude AI to adapt it for multiple social media formats (Twitter thread, LinkedIn post, Instagram caption, blog excerpt, email newsletter). Posts the repurposed content bundle to Slack.

source.originalName: Publish image & video to multiple social media (X, Instagram, Facebook and more)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the repurposed content

originalContent.description: The original content to repurpose (blog post, article, notes, etc.)
